detail.description:
Welcome to Frenzy Screw Puzzle — a flower-themed match-and-earn puzzle game that lets you relax and make money at the same time! 
Tap to match colorful flower-shaped bolts, enjoy the satisfying elimination gameplay, and accumulate cash rewards as you play. Complete levels, collect cash, reach your target and withdraw your earnings. Real rewards are right at your fingertips!

🧩 Gameplay Features  
● Earn Cash by Matching: Get rewards for every match you make, and withdraw once you reach the mini
